title: Global Entertainment Report
headline: Eight Things We’ve Learned About Hollywood This Year
snapshot: Eight Things We’ve Learned About Hollywood This Year. The story carries immediate newsroom value because it combines a clear actor, a live pressure point and a follow-up reporting angle.
key_storylines: Lead headline is selected from current news feed inputs
Cards are populated with sourced story signals
Toolkit box gives journalists direct reporting starting points
No empty cards and no blob data by design
